text:
(a) In addition to the payment of a fee adopted under Section 730.011 (Fees) , an agency may require a requestor to provide reasonable assurance:

(1) as to the identity of the requestor; and

(2) that use of the personal information will be only as authorized or that the consent of the person who is the subject of the information has been obtained.

(b) An agency may require the requestor to make or file a written application in the form and containing any certification requirement the agency may prescribe.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 730. Motor Vehicle Records Disclosure Act
##### § 730.012 — Additional Conditions

(a) In addition to the payment of a fee adopted under Section 730.011 (Fees) , an agency may require a requestor to provide reasonable assurance:

    (1) as to the identity of the requestor; and

    (2) that use of the personal information will be only as authorized or that the consent of the person who is the subject of the information has been obtained.

(b) An agency may require the requestor to make or file a written application in the form and containing any certification requirement the agency may prescribe.

*Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1187, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: In addition to the payment of a fee adopted under Section 730.011 (Fees) , an agency may require a requestor to provide reasonable assurance:
as to the identity of the requestor; and
that use of the personal information will be only as authorized or that the consent of the person who is the subject of the information has been obtained.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: An agency may require the requestor to make or file a written application in the form and containing any certification requirement the agency may prescribe.

history.raw: Added by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 1187, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.
